title: THETA - Sent THETA to old THETA on Ethereum (ETH)

actions.value:
We checked this particular token and turns out it has its own explorer, and probably is a fork of Ethereum. Think of it this way, it is its own coin now and no longer on the ETH network. 


Unfortunately we do not support Theta but only Theta ERC20 tokens, so you should try this: Export your Ethereum Master private key (Tap and hold on your ETH wallet until a menu appears and then tap on "Master Private Key"), go to https://wallet.thetatoken.org/unlock/private-key and paste your private key. 


You should be able to manage your token from there. From there you'll be able to access Theta and send it to another wallet outside of Edge that supports Theta. 


You will need to research what other wallets support Theta though in the mean time.

raw_title: THETA - Sent THETA to old THETA on Ethereum (ETH)
